results.title: Taft College Hall of Fame includes 3 athletics inductees
results.description: Taft College has announced its Class of 2026 Hall of Fame induction class and three of the six honorees are connected to Cougars athletics.

results.title: Jamal Adams Sends Plea for Jets Reunion After Raiders Stint
results.description: It looks like the Las Vegas Raiders have moved on from linebacker Jamal Adams after just one season, making two big-time free-agent signings with linebackers Nakobe Dean and Quay Walker this offseason.Adams, 30, is still a free agent midway through July, and he’s made it clear what team he wants to sign with: the New [...] The post Jamal Adams Sends Plea for Jets Reunion After Raiders Stint appeared first on HEAVY.

results.title: New Aaron Donald Rumors on Timeline, Likely Role for Potential Rams Return amid Retirement
Gill rues middle-order collapse after defeat
results.description: Cardiff: India captain Shubman Gill blamed his side’s middle-order collapse after England chased down a modest 234 with four wickets in hand in the second ODI here on Thursday to level the three-match series 1-1. Joe Root anchored the chase with a patient 99 not out as England chased down the target in 44.1 overs.... The post Gill rues middle-order collapse after defeat appeared first on OrangeNews9 . results.title: Highest and lowest attendances in FIFA World Cup final history ahead of the 2026 decider
results.description: With the sport growing even more, the World Cup finals had diverse attendances.
